query: SELECT ar.id as request_id, ar.status, a.titulo, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM adjustment_comments ac WHERE ac.adjustmentRequestId = ar.id) as num_comments FROM adjustment_requests ar LEFT JOIN actions a ON ar.actionId = a.id WHERE a.titulo LIKE '%sem título%' OR a.titulo IS NULL OR a.titulo = '';
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2kPX7CjhqdMFT8y.671da1035469 --database Uksxtg83ZJDkZPJL3fCmwT --execute SELECT ar.id as request_id, ar.status, a.titulo, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM adjustment_comments ac WHERE ac.adjustmentRequestId = ar.id) as num_comments FROM adjustment_requests ar LEFT JOIN actions a ON ar.actionId = a.id WHERE a.titulo LIKE '%sem título%' OR a.titulo IS NULL OR a.titulo = '';
